# rust/cargo

Installs Rust toolchain via rustup (provides cargo, rustc)

## Key Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `cargo` | Run cargo |
| `cargo --help` | Show help and available options |
| `cargo --version` | Show installed version |

## Common Usage

```bash
# Check if installed
cargo --version

# Show help
cargo --help
```

## Links

- [Homepage](https://rustup.rs)
